templates.name: Quote Step Page
templates.description: Standard page layout for each step in the Quote to Buy flow. Every step follows this template: Progress Banner at top spanning full width, Stepper Navigation fixed on the left, form content centred, and optional Mascot Tip in the right gutter.

layout.responsive: On mobile, stepper collapses to a step counter bar, mascot tip moves inline above the relevant form field

rules: Every step must have a Progress Banner showing 'Step X of 5' and the step title
Stepper Navigation must show all steps with completed (green checkmark), current (highlighted), and upcoming (grey) states
Form content is single column, maximum width 640px, centred in the content area
Only one Primary Button per step — always labelled with the action (Next, Get my quote, Continue to purchase)
Mascot Tip appears at most once per step, positioned next to the most complex decision on that page
Alert Banners for coverage limitations appear immediately after the form field that triggered them

changelog.description: Template cross-referenced with updated component code files and design token exports

layoutSpecs.contentArea: 640px max-width, centred in the space right of the stepper

responsiveBehavior.layout: 3-column: 200px Stepper Navigation | 640px form content (centred) | optional right gutter for Mascot Tip. Progress Banner full-width above all columns. All Stepper steps visible.

2-column: Stepper Navigation collapses to a 60px icon-only sidebar OR is hidden behind a toggle. Form content expands to fill available space up to 640px. Mascot Tip moves below its related form field. Progress Banner full-width.

Single column. Stepper Navigation replaced by a compact step-counter bar (Step X of 5 + horizontal track) pinned below the Progress Banner. Form content full viewport width with 16px horizontal margin. Mascot Tip appears inline above the relevant field. Primary/Secondary buttons full-width at bottom of viewport.

pageComposition.description: Quote Flow variant of Header Bar — RAA logo left, "Home Insurance Quote" centred, "Need help" link and icon right. Fixed at top, 64px height. Chat Widget absent during payment entry step.
Full-width yellow (#FFD100) banner directly below the Header Bar. Shows "Step X of 5" and the current step title as h1. 112px height. Padding 32px 0.

200px fixed left column below the Progress Banner. Shows all 5 steps: completed (green checkmark, clickable), current (dark number, current), upcoming (grey, non-interactive). Vertical connector lines between steps.

Centred content column, max-width 640px. Single-column form layout. Alert Banners appear inline at the point of relevance. Mascot Tip positioned right of or below the most complex field. Form ends with Primary Button (right-aligned) and optional Secondary Button ("Back", left-aligned).
Application Footer variant — single row with Privacy Policy, Cookie Policy, Terms and Conditions links and copyright. Not sticky — scrolls with page content.

templates.name: My Account Page
templates.description: Standard page layout for all My Account sections. Fixed sidebar navigation on the left, breadcrumb trail above the content area, main content on the right. Used for dashboard, product details, personal details, and all sub-pages.

layout.responsive: On mobile, sidebar becomes a hamburger menu overlay, breadcrumb simplifies to a back arrow with parent page name

rules: Sidebar must always be visible on desktop — it is the primary navigation for My Account
Active section in sidebar must be highlighted with a left border indicator
Breadcrumb must reflect the full navigation depth (Home > My Products > Home Insurance)
Dashboard layout follows the Dashboard Layout pattern
Sub-pages use a single-column content layout with section headings

changelog.description: Template cross-referenced with updated component code files and design token exports

layoutSpecs.contentArea: Flexible: viewport width minus 240px sidebar minus 32px margin each side

responsiveBehavior.layout: 2-region split: 240px fixed Sidebar Navigation on the left, flexible content area on the right. Header Bar fixed top. Breadcrumb at top of content area. Product Cards in 2-column grid. Quick Action Cards in 2-column grid.

Sidebar Navigation collapses to a hamburger menu (≡) icon in the Header Bar area. Tapping opens the sidebar as a full-height overlay panel with a close (×) button. Content area expands to full width. Product Cards remain 2-column. Breadcrumb simplifies to back arrow + parent page name.

Single column. Sidebar Navigation is a hamburger overlay (same as tablet). Content area is full viewport width with 16px margin. Product Cards stack to 1 column. Quick Action Cards stack to 1 column. Promo Banner stacks text above image. Contact Section rows stack vertically.

pageComposition.description: My Account variant of Header Bar — RAA logo left, "My Account" label, "Need help" link and "Log out" button right. Fixed top, 64px height. On mobile/tablet: hamburger menu icon added left of logo to trigger sidebar overlay.

240px wide, full-height sticky sidebar. Top-level sections: My Account home, My details, My products, My claims, My member benefits. Collapsible sub-sections with chevron toggles. Active item highlighted with 3px left border. Hidden on mobile/tablet (replaced by hamburger overlay).

Breadcrumb trail at the top of the content area below the Header Bar. Shows full path from My Account home to the current page. Omitted on the My Account home page itself. Home icon links to dashboard.

Flexible content area. Dashboard home: Member Info Card → Product Card grid → Quick Action Card grid → Promo Banner → Contact Section. Sub-pages: page heading (h1) → relevant content components → Contact Section at bottom.
Application Footer variant. Single row with legal links and copyright. Sticks below all content, not fixed to viewport.

templates.name: Quote Result Page
templates.description: The 'Your Quote' page layout showing the generated insurance quote. Displays the quote summary with pricing, coverage details grid, optional cover add-ons, and purchase action.

regions: Quote Summary Card (centre, top of content)

rules: Quote Summary Card must appear at the top of the content area with the price prominently displayed
Monthly price is the default display — annual price shown as secondary option
Coverage Grid shows what is included in the policy in a 3-column layout
Optional covers appear below the coverage grid with toggle switches
The 'Buy now' Primary Button and 'Save quote' Secondary Button appear at the bottom
If the user adjusts the excess, the price should update immediately (not require a save/recalculate)

changelog.description: Template cross-referenced with updated component code files and design token exports

layoutSpecs.contentArea: 640px max-width centred in the space right of the stepper

responsiveBehavior.layout: 3-column: 200px Stepper Navigation | content column (Quote Summary Card, Coverage Grid, Cover Option Cards, action buttons). Progress Banner full-width. Quote Summary Card is the hero element at the top of the content column. Coverage Grid is 3 columns within the content column.

Stepper Navigation collapses to icon-only or hidden behind toggle. Content column expands. Quote Summary Card and Coverage Grid remain side-by-side where space allows; Coverage Grid drops to 2-column. Cover Option Cards remain full-width stacked.

Single column. Stepper replaced by step-counter bar. Quote Summary Card full-width with monthly price prominent. Coverage Grid collapses to 2-column or single column. Cover Option Cards full-width stacked. Buy now / Save quote buttons full-width, stacked vertically (Buy now on top).

pageComposition.description: Quote Flow variant. Same as all Quote to Buy steps. Chat Widget visible on this page (reappears after being hidden during payment entry).
Shows "Step 5 of 5 — Your quote". Yellow full-width banner. The page h1 is "Your quote". The final step in the quote sub-flow before the purchase sub-flow begins.

200px fixed left column. Step 5 (Your quote) is the current step. Steps 1–4 are completed (green checkmarks, clickable to navigate back). No upcoming steps in this sub-flow — the stepper shows all 5 as either completed or current.

Centred content column, max-width 640px. Order: (1) Quote Summary Card with pricing and policy details; (2) Coverage Grid showing included cover items in 3-column layout; (3) Cover Option Cards for Accidental Damage Cover and Pet Cover (defaulted off); (4) Optional Summary Table for excess details; (5) Accordion for full PDS and key information. Alert Banners for coverage limitations appear inline after relevant selections.

Bottom of content column. Primary Button: "Buy now" (right-aligned on desktop, full-width on mobile). Secondary Button: "Save quote" or "Email this quote to myself" (left-aligned on desktop, full-width below Primary on mobile). 32px top margin from last content element.
